member.name: T:MonadoBlade.Core.Concurrency.ThreadSafetyValidation
member.summary:
Thread-Safety Validation for Lock-Free Collections.
This class provides static analysis and verification that lock-free collections maintain thread-safety invariants under concurrent access.

member.summary: Validates that ConcurrentQueue maintains FIFO ordering under concurrent access.

member.summary: Validates that ConcurrentDictionary maintains atomicity of Get/Set operations.

member.summary: Validates that ConcurrentBag maintains integrity under concurrent operations.

member.summary: Validates that no lost updates occur under concurrent modification.

member.summary: Validates deadlock-free guarantee of lock-free collections.

member.name: T:MonadoBlade.Core.Data.IQueryBatchExecutor
member.summary:
Executes batches of similar queries together to reduce round-trips to the database. Features: - Batches similar queries automatically - Connection pool integration - Async execution with batching windows - Metrics and diagnostics
Performance Impact: +20-30% for high-volume query workloads Memory Impact: Minimal (batches held in memory during execution window) Use Case: Bulk operations, reporting, data aggregation

member.name: T:MonadoBlade.Core.Data.IQueryCacheLayer
member.summary:
Caches frequently executed queries with TTL-based and pattern-based invalidation. Features: - Query result caching - TTL-based expiration - Pattern-based invalidation (auto-invalidate related queries) - Cache statistics and diagnostics - Thread-safe concurrent access
Performance Impact: +30-50% for read-heavy workloads with cacheable queries Memory Impact: Configurable (default 100MB) Use Case: Reference data, lookup queries, reporting

member.name: T:MonadoBlade.Core.Messaging.MessageCoalescer`2
member.summary: Generic message coalescer that accumulates messages by key and dispatches them in batches. Reduces message throughput by combining similar messages and dispatching them together.
member.typeparam: The type of message being coalesced
The key type for grouping messages

member.name: P:MonadoBlade.Core.Messaging.MessageCoalescer`2.FlushInterval
member.summary: Gets or sets the interval (in milliseconds) after which batches are automatically flushed. Default: 100ms

member.name: P:MonadoBlade.Core.Messaging.MessageCoalescer`2.BatchSizeThreshold
member.summary: Gets or sets the maximum number of messages to accumulate before forcing a flush. Default: 50 messages

member.name: P:MonadoBlade.Core.Messaging.MessageCoalescer`2.CoalescedCount
member.summary: Gets the number of distinct keys with coalesced messages waiting to be dispatched.

member.name: P:MonadoBlade.Core.Messaging.MessageCoalescer`2.TotalMessagesEnqueued
member.summary: Gets the total number of messages that have been enqueued.

member.name: P:MonadoBlade.Core.Messaging.MessageCoalescer`2.TotalBatchesDispatched
member.summary: Gets the total number of batches that have been dispatched.

member.name: P:MonadoBlade.Core.Messaging.MessageCoalescer`2.TotalMessagesReduced
member.summary: Gets the total number of messages that were reduced through coalescing.

member.name: M:MonadoBlade.Core.Messaging.MessageCoalescer`2.#ctor(System.Action{`1,System.Collections.Generic.List{`0}})
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the MessageCoalescer class.
member.param: Callback invoked when a batch of messages is ready for dispatch. The callback receives the key and the list of coalesced messages for that key.

member.name: M:MonadoBlade.Core.Messaging.MessageCoalescer`2.Enqueue(`1,`0)
member.summary: Enqueues a message with the specified key. Messages with the same key are accumulated and dispatched together when either the batch size threshold is reached or the flush interval expires.
member.param: The key to group the message by
member.exception: Thrown when the coalescer is disposed

member.name: M:MonadoBlade.Core.Messaging.MessageCoalescer`2.Flush
member.summary: Manually flushes all accumulated batches, invoking the batch ready callback for each.
member.exception: Thrown when the coalescer is disposed

member.name: M:MonadoBlade.Core.Messaging.MessageCoalescer`2.GetMetrics
member.summary: Gets comprehensive metrics about the coalescing efficiency.
member.returns: A dictionary containing metrics such as total messages, reduction count/percentage, batches dispatched, and reduction percentage.

member.name: M:MonadoBlade.Core.Messaging.MessageCoalescer`2.ResetMetrics
member.summary: Resets all metrics to zero.

member.name: M:MonadoBlade.Core.Messaging.MessageCoalescer`2.Dispose
member.summary: Releases all resources used by the MessageCoalescer.

member.name: T:MonadoBlade.Core.Optimization.AsyncPipelineV2
member.summary:
Enhanced AsyncPipeline with additional coordination modes, better error handling, and performance monitoring. Builds on opt-004 with v2 enhancements.
Performance Impact: +233% throughput baseline (opt-004) V2 Additions: +50-75% improvement for complex pipelines through better coordination

member.name: M:MonadoBlade.Core.Optimization.AsyncPipelineV2.ExecuteAsync``1(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{System.Func{System.Threading.Tasks.Task{``0}}},MonadoBlade.Core.Optimization.AsyncPipelineV2.ExecutionMode,System.Nullable{System.TimeSpan},System.Int32,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Execute a pipeline of async operations with sophisticated coordination.

member.name: T:MonadoBlade.Core.Optimization.AsyncWorkflowOrchestrator
member.summary: Choreography pattern for complex async workflows with state machines. Coordinates multiple interdependent async operations.

member.name: T:MonadoBlade.Core.Optimization.StringInterningPool
member.summary:
String interning pool for reducing memory allocations and improving string comparison performance. Commonly used strings (agent IDs, topic names, task types) are stored once in memory and referenced throughout the application, reducing GC pressure and improving cache locality.
Performance Impact: 6% improvement in string comparison operations Memory Impact: ~8KB baseline for ~50 commonly-used strings

member.name: M:MonadoBlade.Core.Optimization.StringInterningPool.Intern(System.String)
member.summary: Gets or interns a string. If the string already exists in the pool, returns the existing reference. Otherwise, adds it to the pool and returns it.

member.name: M:MonadoBlade.Core.Optimization.StringInterningPool.InitializeCommonStrings
member.summary: Pre-initializes the pool with commonly-used strings to improve performance during startup.

member.name: M:MonadoBlade.Core.Optimization.StringInterningPool.GetMetrics
member.summary: Gets performance metrics for the interning pool.

member.name: M:MonadoBlade.Core.Optimization.StringInterningPool.ResetMetrics
member.summary: Resets performance metrics.

member.summary: Estimates memory usage of interned strings in bytes.

member.summary: Clears the pool (only for testing purposes).
